query:
SELECT 
  external_id,
  amount,
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS principal_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS interest_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS fee_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS penalty_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS close_amount,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS bad_debt_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND DATE(paid_at) = '2026-04-01'
LIMIT 5;

  amount,
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.principal_paid') AS principal_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.interest_paid') AS interest_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.fee_paid') AS fee_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.penalty_paid') AS penalty_paid,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.close_installment_amount') AS close_amount,
  JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.bad_debt_amount') AS bad_debt_amount
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND DATE(paid_at) = '2026-04-01'
LIMIT 5;
